title: conyza copiapina
intro: Conyza copiapina, also known as Chilean fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Conyza copiapina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of South America.
